tasks.label: Astro: Dev + Preview
tasks.command: Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run','dev'; $timeout = 30; $elapsed = 0; do { Start-Sleep 1; $elapsed++ } while (-not (Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 4321 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue) -and $elapsed -lt $timeout); Start-Process 'vscode://vscode.simple-browser/show?url=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A4321%2F'
